prompt: Create a photorealistic hero image for the Breathe landing page. Breathe is an AI hiring engine for high-volume teams. Ownable territory: candidate operations. Show a real frontline hiring environment: warehouse aisle, loading zone, staging area, or dense operations floor. Repeated structures, visible depth, labels, motion, and operational pressure. Humans secondary, natural, never posed, never office-lifestyle. Premium editorial technology photography, highly realistic, with natural light, fine film grain, lens realism, and slight motion blur. Mood: calm, expensive, precise, operational. Visual direction: Sierra composure, Palantir seriousness, Luminous throughput, without military or surveillance vibes. Warm bone and stone palette. Avoid devices, dashboards, holograms, fake floating UI, and command-center aesthetics. Landscape image for a desktop landing hero, cinematic crop, tightly composed, high realism.
